cards.name: Sarkhan, Dragon-Soul
cards.reason: Ultimate Planeswalker that generates Dragon tokens and provides Storm-like value

cards.name: Ugin's Breath
cards.reason: Massive colorless board wipe that exiles; essential for any control strategy

cards.name: Dragonstorm Alpha
cards.reason: Gives all your creatures Haste and has a Harmonize trigger to double your best spell

cards.name: Zurgo, the Unstoppable
cards.reason: Indestructible on your turn and generates Mobilize tokens whenever it attacks

cards.name: Spirit of the Khan
cards.reason: A 2/2 for 1 mana that taxes the opponent's non-Dragon spells

cards.name: Dragonfire Volley
cards.reason: Premier removal that deals 4 damage and can deal 1 to all enemies if you have a Dragon

cards.name: Abzan Outlast
cards.reason: Provides +1/+1 counters and Lifelink; cornerstone of the Counters archetype

cards.name: Mobilize the Hordes
cards.reason: Creates three 1/1 Warrior tokens at instant speed; perfect for Mardu Mobilize

cards.name: Sultai Graverobber
cards.reason: Key enabler for 'Leaves the Graveyard' that grows every time a card is exiled

cards.name: Jeskai Insight
cards.reason: Draws cards and grants Prowess to your team for a turn

tiers.label: Good Playables
tiers.description: Solid cards that make every deck better

cards.name: Warrior of the Steppe
cards.reason: Solid 2-drop that creates a Mobilize token on ETB

cards.name: Harmonize Echo
cards.reason: Utility spell that copies the next instant or sorcery; great for Two Spells decks

cards.name: Temur Brawler
cards.reason: High-toughness creature that enables Harmonize for your biggest spells

cards.name: Blood-Sacrifice Rite
cards.reason: Efficient sacrifice outlet that provides card draw and life drain

cards.name: Sandblast Sentinel
cards.reason: Provides +1/+1 counters to your Spirit tokens; key for Abzan Endure

cards.name: Tarkir Wilds
cards.reason: Standard fetch land for mana fixing; slow but necessary for 3-color clans

cards.name: Dragon-Scale Shield
cards.reason: Equipment that provides minimal stats; only good if you need more artifact count

cards.name: Reckless Strike
cards.reason: Cheap combat trick that is fine but easily telegraphed

tiers.label: Sideboard / Avoid
tiers.description: Only play if desperate or as sideboard cards

cards.name: Dragon-Slayer's Trap
cards.reason: Narrow removal that only hits Dragons; sideboard only

cards.name: Whispering Spirits
cards.reason: Too small of a body for its mana cost, even in Spirit decks

tiers.label: Unplayable
tiers.description: Never put these in your deck

cards.name: Broken Dragon-Egg
cards.reason: Too slow, too random, and zero board impact
